requirement_topic.en: Malaysia Grid Connection for BESS — ST Grid Code, TNB Connection Requirements, and 50 Hz System
requirement_topic.zh: 马来西亚BESS并网——ST电网规范、TNB并网要求及50 Hz系统
requirement_topic.zht: 馬來西亞BESS併網——ST電網規範、TNB併網要求及50 Hz系統

summary.en: Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST), the Energy Commission of Malaysia, is the statutory regulator under the Electricity Supply Act 1990 (ESA 1990). All grid-connected generation and storage facilities in Peninsular Malaysia and Sabah require an ST licence or exemption under the ESA 1990. Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB) is the transmission and distribution system operator in Peninsular Malaysia. BESS installations connected to the TNB distribution or transmission network require TNB grid-connection approval and must comply with the TNB Connection and Use of System Code (CUSC) and the Grid Code (Peninsular Malaysia). Malaysia's grid operates at 50 Hz ±0.5 Hz (240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase for low-voltage distribution; 11 kV and above for medium and high voltage). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be configured and validated for Malaysia's 50 Hz grid parameters. IEC 62933 series standards (including IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2) may be referenced in utility-scale BESS project technical specifications and TNB connection agreements. Malaysia utility-scale BESS is an emerging sector; TNB has conducted BESS tenders under the national energy transition roadmap. Project-specific ST licensing conditions and TNB connection agreement technical requirements must be obtained directly from ST and TNB for each project.
summary.zh: 能源委员会（Suruhanjaya Tenaga，ST）是依据1990年《电力供应法》（ESA 1990）设立的马来西亚法定监管机构。半岛马来西亚和沙巴所有并网发电和储能设施均须取得依据ESA 1990颁发的ST许可证或豁免。国家能源公司（Tenaga Nasional Berhad，TNB）是半岛马来西亚输配电系统运营商。接入TNB配电或输电网的BESS装置须取得TNB并网批准，并须符合TNB《系统接入和使用规范》（CUSC）及《电网规范》（半岛马来西亚）。马来西亚电网运行参数为50 Hz ±0.5 Hz（低压配电：单相240 V、三相415 V；中高压：11 kV及以上）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对马来西亚50 Hz电网参数进行配置和验证。IEC 62933系列标准（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）可能在公用事业规模BESS项目技术规格和TNB并网协议中引用。马来西亚公用事业规模储能属新兴领域；TNB已依据国家能源转型路线图开展储能招标。每个项目的专属ST许可条件和TNB并网协议技术要求须直接向ST和TNB获取。
summary.zht: 能源委員會（Suruhanjaya Tenaga，ST）是依據1990年《電力供應法》（ESA 1990）設立的馬來西亞法定監管機構。半島馬來西亞和沙巴所有併網發電和儲能設施均須取得依據ESA 1990頒發的ST許可證或豁免。國家能源公司（Tenaga Nasional Berhad，TNB）是半島馬來西亞輸配電系統運營商。接入TNB配電或輸電網的BESS裝置須取得TNB併網批准，並須符合TNB《系統接入和使用規範》（CUSC）及《電網規範》（半島馬來西亞）。馬來西亞電網運行參數為50 Hz ±0.5 Hz（低壓配電：單相240 V、三相415 V；中高壓：11 kV及以上）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對馬來西亞50 Hz電網參數進行配置和驗證。IEC 62933系列標準（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2）可能在公用事業規模BESS項目技術規格和TNB併網協議中引用。馬來西亞公用事業規模儲能屬新興領域；TNB已依據國家能源轉型路線圖開展儲能招標。每個項目的專屬ST許可條件和TNB併網協議技術要求須直接向ST和TNB獲取。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Supply Act 1990 (ESA 1990) — Malaysia statutory framework for electricity licensing; ST is the regulator
TNB Grid Code (Peninsular Malaysia) — technical requirements for generation and storage assets connected to the TNB transmission network
TNB Connection and Use of System Code (CUSC) — connection requirements for distribution-connected BESS
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Malaysia grid parameters: 50 Hz ±0.5 Hz, 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase (LV); 11 kV / 33 kV / 132 kV / 275 kV (MV/HV)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Malaysia's 240/415 V (LV). PCS firmware and voltage protection parameters configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised for Malaysia's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid conditions before grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与马来西亚低压240/415 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件和保护参数，须在并网测试和调试前重新针对马来西亚240/415 V、50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與馬來西亞低壓240/415 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體和保護參數，須在併網測試和調試前重新針對馬來西亞240/415 V、50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ST licensing requirements or TNB grid-connection requirements in Malaysia. Key gaps requiring attention: (a) ST licence — any entity operating a generation or storage facility exceeding the ESA 1990 exemption threshold requires an ST licence; obtain ST pre-project guidance on BESS licensing category; (b) grid voltage — Malaysia LV is 240/415 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and reactive power capability must be reconfigured and retested for Malaysia's grid parameters; (c) TNB project-specific connection agreement — engage TNB at the earliest project stage to obtain the applicable CUSC/Grid Code technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (d) IEC 62933 series — where project specifications or TNB connection agreement require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA/communication interface protocol required by TNB for BESS monitoring.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足马来西亚ST许可要求或TNB并网要求。需重点关注的主要差距：（a）ST许可证——超过ESA 1990豁免门槛运营发电或储能设施的任何主体须取得ST许可证；就BESS许可类别向ST寻求项目前指引；（b）电网电压——马来西亚低压为240/415 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及无功功率能力须重新针对马来西亚电网参数配置并重新测试；（c）TNB项目专属并网协议——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与TNB接触以获取适用CUSC/电网规范技术要求；（d）IEC 62933系列——若项目规格或TNB并网协议要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（e）通信协议——确认TNB对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足馬來西亞ST許可要求或TNB併網要求。需重點關注的主要差距：（a）ST許可證——超過ESA 1990豁免門檻運營發電或儲能設施的任何主體須取得ST許可證；就BESS許可類別向ST尋求項目前指引；（b）電網電壓——馬來西亞低壓為240/415 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及無功功率能力須重新針對馬來西亞電網參數配置並重新測試；（c）TNB項目專屬併網協議——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與TNB接觸以獲取適用CUSC/電網規範技術要求；（d）IEC 62933系列——若項目規格或TNB併網協議要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（e）通訊協議——確認TNB對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ST licence required under Electricity Supply Act 1990 for grid-connected BESS above exemption threshold; TNB grid-connection approval required for all TNB-network-connected BESS; project-specific technical requirements defined in TNB CUSC and connection agreement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Malaysia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Malaysia ST licensing or TNB grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Malaysia's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid. Obtain ST pre-project guidance on BESS licensing category and engage TNB at the earliest project stage to determine CUSC/Grid Code technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. Malaysia utility-scale BESS is an emerging sector — project-specific ST and TNB requirements must be confirmed directly before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足马来西亚ST许可或TNB并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对马来西亚240/415 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应就BESS许可类别向ST寻求项目前指引，并在项目最早阶段与TNB接触，确定CUSC/电网规范技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。马来西亚公用事业规模储能属新兴领域——在设备采购最终确定前，须直接确认ST和TNB的专属要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足馬來西亞ST許可或TNB併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對馬來西亞240/415 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應就BESS許可類別向ST尋求項目前指引，並在項目最早階段與TNB接觸，確定CUSC/電網規範技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。馬來西亞公用事業規模儲能屬新興領域——在設備採購最終確定前，須直接確認ST和TNB的專屬要求。
